nasb.text: which in other generations was not made known to the sons of men, as it has now been revealed to His holy apostles and prophets in the Spirit;

esv.text: which was not made known to the sons of men in other generations as it has now been revealed to his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit.

cnv.text: 這奧祕在以前的世代並沒有讓世人知道，不像現在藉著聖靈啟示了聖使徒和先知那樣。

ccb.text: 自古以来，上帝没有让人知道这奥秘，如今祂借着圣灵将这奥秘启示给祂的圣使徒和先知。

csbs.text: 这奥秘在别的各世代并不显明给人类，不像如今藉着圣灵启示给了他的圣使徒和先知们。
